name: sigil-lang
description: Sigil - A machine-first programming language optimized for AI code generation

scripts.lex: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil lex
scripts.sigil:test:canonical-stdlib: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && (cd projects/canonicalStdlibAudit && ../../language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test tests && ../../language/compiler/target/debug/sigil run src/main.sigil)
scripts.sigil:test:docs-drift: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && (cd projects/docsDriftAudit && ../../language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test tests && ../../language/compiler/target/debug/sigil run src/main.sigil)
scripts.sigil:test:fixtures: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test language/test-fixtures/tests
scripts.sigil:test:language: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test language/tests
scripts.sigil:test:stdlib: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test language/stdlib-tests/tests
scripts.sigil:test:homebrew: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && bash tools/checkHomebrewFormula.sh
scripts.sigil:test:http: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test language/integrationTests/tests/httpClientServer.sigil
scripts.sigil:test:tcp: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test language/integrationTests/tests/tcpClientServer.sigil
scripts.sigil:test:algorithms: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test projects/algorithms/tests
scripts.sigil:test:ssg: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test projects/ssg/tests
scripts.sigil:test:todo: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test projects/todo-app/tests
scripts.sigil:test:canonical: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test language/integrationTests/tests/canonical.sigil
scripts.sigil:test:multimodule: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && language/compiler/target/debug/sigil test language/integrationTests/tests/multimodule.sigil
scripts.sigil:test:all: pnpm sigil:test:canonical-stdlib && pnpm sigil:test:compiler && pnpm sigil:test:docs-drift && pnpm sigil:test:fixtures && pnpm sigil:test:language && pnpm sigil:test:stdlib && pnpm sigil:test:homebrew && pnpm sigil:test:http && pnpm sigil:test:tcp && pnpm sigil:test:algorithms && pnpm sigil:test:ssg && pnpm sigil:test:todo && pnpm sigil:test:multimodule
scripts.sigil:package:homebrew:
cargo build --quiet --manifest-path language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && VERSION=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import re
line=open('packaging/homebrew/SHA256SUMS').read().splitlines()[0]
match=re.search(r'sigil-(.*)-darwin-arm64\.tar\.gz', line)
print(match.group(1) if match else '')
PY
) && sigilHomebrewVersion=$VERSION sigilHomebrewRepo=inerte/sigil sigilHomebrewSha256SumsPath=packaging/homebrew/SHA256SUMS sigilHomebrewOutputPath=packaging/homebrew/Formula/sigil.rb language/compiler/target/debug/sigil run projects/homebrewPackaging/src/main.sigil
